creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
Update postfix to version 2.6.5

Fixes from HISTORY:
=========================

20090805
   Bugfix: don't panic when an unexpected smtpd access map is
   specified. File: smtpd/smtpd_check.c.

@sahil,
Thanks for the hint (PR 138198) is already closed.
I wondered the massive code changes for 2.6.4 which are not typical for Wietse.
Now it looks more serious ;)
